questions.question: Represent the following statement using predicate logic: 'John is taller than Mary.' using the predicate P(x, y) meaning 'x is taller than y.'
questions.hint: Use the predicate logic notation to represent the statement.

questions.question: Using predicate logic, represent the following statement: 'All birds can fly.'
questions.hint: Use the universal quantifier to represent the statement.

questions.question: Represent the following statement using predicate logic: 'Socrates is a philosopher who has written at least one book.' using the predicates P(x) meaning 'x is a philosopher' and W(x) meaning 'x has written a book.'
questions.hint: Use the existential quantifier to represent the statement.
